case_title: MASAYUKI TANAKA VS. DONALD JERMAINE YOUNG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY TANAKA, MASAYUKI AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, DONALD JERMAINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
